Yahi ho 2026 PUBG MOBILE National Championship South Asia Finals ko antim adhyay. Kati din samma bhayeko intense battles pachi, sabai kura Day 2 ma aayera thamncha, jaha Top 16 teams afno sabai shakti diyera euta matra lakshya ko lagi ladchan: South Asia ko champion banna.

Pratyek match, pratyek elimination, ra pratyek rotation le yo teams ko bhagya nirdharit garnecha. Yo bela second chance chaina вҖ“ euta matra team sabai bhanda mathi uthnecha ra title claim garnecha.

Top 3 teams PMGO ma qualify hunechan.

Match Schedule
Finals: 2 Days | 16 вҖ“ 17 April
Time: From 17:50 (GMT +5:45) Daily onwards

Finalist Teams:
Hidden Leaf Esports
Abrupt Slayers
NEPX ESPORTS
3 Real Bros

4 Death Machines

snippet.title: LALIBAZAR | Official Movie Trailer | Swastima Khadka, Rabindra Singh Baniya, Samaira, Prashamsha
snippet.description:
LALIBAZAR - New Nepali Movie Official Trailer 2026 || Swastima Khadka, Bishal Devkota, Rabindra Singh Baniya, Samaira Thapa, Prashamsa Subedi, Mukunda Kumar Shrestha, Abaya Baral, Asha Poudel, Govinda Sunar, Abha Aryal, Tara Sharma, Ramesh Badi, Nabaraj Regmi, Ghana Shyam Joshi, Pradip Dhakal, Mohan Panthi, JB Ruwali, Swarasoti Adhikari, Bhumika Tharu, Sagar Ghimire,Haroon Ali, Prem Pandey || Lalibazar New Nepali Full Movie 2026

In Cinemas - Baisakh 18, 2083 ( 1st May 2026)

snippet.title: CHATORI BAHU 2 I аӨҡаӨҹаҘӢаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ¬аӨ№аҘӮ 2 I OFFICIAL TRAILER I ANJANA SINGH I NEW BHOJPURI MOVIE 2026
snippet.description:
#anjanasingh #prashantsingh #ladomadhesiya #jyotimishra #Chatoribahu #anjanasinghfanpage #fortune #bhojpurimovie #bhojpuri #trailer #trending

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH 3R FILMS AND PRODUCTION 

Brand Partner вҖ“ Fortune refined soyabean oil

аҘһаӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® - 

аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨ…аӨӮаӨңаӨЁаӨҫ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№ , аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ¶аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№ , аӨІаӨҫаӨЎаҘӢ аӨ®аӨ§аҘҮаӨёаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ  ,аӨңаҘҚаӨҜаҘӢаӨӨаӨҝ  аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ  , аӨёаҘӢаӨЁаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ  аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ , аӨ…аӨ®аӨ°  аӨ•аҘҒаӨ¶ , аӨ…аӨ®аӨҝаӨӨ аӨ¶аҘҒаӨ•аҘҚаӨІаӨҫ , аӨ°аҘӮаӨӘаӨҫ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№ ,аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫаӨ¶  аӨңаҘҲаӨё , аӨёаҘҖ.аӨӘаҘҖ аӨӯаӨҹаҘҚаӨҹ  , аӨёаӨӘаӨЁаӨҫ  аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө  .

аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨўаҘӢаӨІаҘӮ , аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨӨ

аӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨёаҘҮаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№

аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ• вҖ“ аӨҮаӨ¶аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаҘҳ аӨ¶аҘҮаӨ– аӨ¬аӨӮаӨҹаҘҖ


аӨІаҘҮаӨ–аӨ• - аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰ аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ


аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°-  аӨ“аӨ® аӨқаӨҫ

                                 аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰ аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ


аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аӨІаӨЁ - аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨӨаӨ® аӨЁаӨҫаӨҜаӨ•

аӨӣаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аӨЁ - аӨ№аӨ°аҘҖаӨ¶ аӨёаӨҫаӨөаӨӮаӨӨ  
 
аӨ•аҘӢаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨ«аӨ° - аӨёаҘӢаӨЁаҘӮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨӨаӨ®

аӨӘаҘӢаӨёаҘҚаӨҹ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ- аӨ‘аӨҜ аӨөаӨҝаҘӣаӨЁ аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘӮаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ (аӨЁаӨҫаӨ—аҘҮаӨӮаӨҰаҘҚаӨ° аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө )

аӨҶаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨЎаӨҫаӨҜаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹаӨ° - аӨ¶аӨҝаӨөаӨҫ аӨңаӨҜаӨёаӨөаӨҫаӨІ

аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№, аӨҮаӨ¶аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаҘҳ аӨ¶аҘҲаҘҷ аӨ¬аӨӮаӨҹаҘҖ

 аӨ®аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨҝаӨ• вҖ“ IVY MUSIC
аӨёаҘ…аӨҹаҘ…аӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨҹ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨҝаӨҹаӨІ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаӨЁаӨ° - B4U аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ




B4U аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҸаӨҹаӨҝаӨө аӨҹаҘҖаӨ® вҖ“ 

аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҒаӨҰ аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ, аӨЁаҘҮаӨ№аӨҫ аӨүаӨӘаӨҫаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫаӨІ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө


B4U аӨІаҘҖаӨ—аӨІ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЈаӨҫ , аӨӨаҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈаӨҫ аӨӘаӨҹаҘҮаӨІ , аӨӘаҘӮаӨЁаӨ® аӨ¶аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҮ , аӨҶаӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨөаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢаӨЎаҘҮ вҖ“ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ°аҘҮ

IVY вҖ“ аӨҸаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аӨҹаҘҮаӨЁаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ -  аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё  

аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ—аӨҫ , аӨңаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨІаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨё , аӨөаӨҝаӨӘаҘҒаӨІ аӨңаҘҲаӨЁ , аӨЁаӨҝаӨөаҘғаӨӨаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҹаӨҝаӨІ, аӨ№аӨҝаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ¶аҘҒ аӨҡаҘҢаӨ§аӨ°аҘҖ

B4U - аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё

аӨёаӨӮаӨӨаҘӢаӨ· аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨ— , аӨ°аӨөаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨІаҘҚаӨөаҘҖ , аӨ¶аҘҲаӨІаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨөаҘҮаӨҰаҘҖ








                 FILM- CHATORI BAHU 2 
 

STARCAST-ANJANA SINGH, PRASHANT SINGH, LADO MADHESIYA ,JYOTI MISHRA , SONALI MISHRA, AMAR KUSH,AMIT SHUKLA, RUPA SINGH,PRAKSH JAIS, C.P BHATT , SAPNA YADAV .
CHILD ARTIST - DHOLU , CHAHHAT
CONCEPT вҖ“ SANDEEP SINGH 
STORY- ARBIND TIWARI
DIRECTOR- ISHTIYAQUE SHAIKH BUNTY 
MUSIC DIRECTOR- OM JHA
LYRICS вҖ“ ARBIND TIWARI 
EDITOR- PREETAM NAYAK 
CINEMATOGRAPHER- HARISH SAWANT 
CHOREOGRAPHER-SONU PRITAM 
ART DIRECTOR- SHIVA JAYSWAL 
POST PRODUCTION вҖ“ EYE VISION STUDIO (NAGENDRA YADAV)

PRODUCER- SANDEEP SINGH, ISHTIYAQ SHAIKH BUNTY 
CO PRODUCER вҖ“ NOORSABHA SHAIKH 
Music вҖ“ IVY 
Satellite and Digital partner- B4U BHOJPURI

B4U CREATIVE TEAM 
MARUDA SHARMA ( E.P ), NEHA UPADHYAY, VISHAL YADAV 

B4U - LEGAL TEAM 
SANDEEP RANA , TRUSHNA PATEL , RAJVI SHIRODARIYA , POONAM SHINDE , AKANKSHA WAKODE

OFFICE BOY -  KANHAIYA JHA

PRADEEP K DAGA , JINELLE MASCARENHAS , VIPUL JAIN , NIVRUTTI PATIL , HIMANSHU CHAUDHARY

аӨҶаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨЎаӨҫаӨҜаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹаӨ° - аӨ¶аӨҝаӨөаӨҫ аӨңаӨҜаӨёаӨөаӨҫаӨІ

аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№, аӨҮаӨ¶аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаҘҳ аӨ¶аҘҲаҘҷ аӨ¬аӨӮаӨҹаҘҖ

 аӨ®аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨҝаӨ• вҖ“ IVY MUSIC
аӨёаҘ…аӨҹаҘ…аӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨҹ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨҝаӨҹаӨІ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаӨЁаӨ° - B4U аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ




B4U аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҸаӨҹаӨҝаӨө аӨҹаҘҖаӨ® вҖ“ 

аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҒаӨҰ аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ, аӨЁаҘҮаӨ№аӨҫ аӨүаӨӘаӨҫаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫаӨІ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө


B4U аӨІаҘҖаӨ—аӨІ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЈаӨҫ , аӨӨаҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈаӨҫ аӨӘаӨҹаҘҮаӨІ , аӨӘаҘӮаӨЁаӨ® аӨ¶аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҮ , аӨҶаӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨөаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢаӨЎаҘҮ вҖ“ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ°аҘҮ

IVY вҖ“ аӨҸаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аӨҹаҘҮаӨЁаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ -  аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё  

аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ—аӨҫ , аӨңаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨІаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨё , аӨөаӨҝаӨӘаҘҒаӨІ аӨңаҘҲаӨЁ , аӨЁаӨҝаӨөаҘғаӨӨаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҹаӨҝаӨІ, аӨ№аӨҝаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ¶аҘҒ аӨҡаҘҢаӨ§аӨ°аҘҖ

B4U - аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё

аӨёаӨӮаӨӨаҘӢаӨ· аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨ— , аӨ°аӨөаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨІаҘҚаӨөаҘҖ , аӨ¶аҘҲаӨІаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨөаҘҮаӨҰаҘҖ

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk рҹ§ҹвҖҚвҷҖпёҸ

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards рҹ‘»

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sisterвҖҷs wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaosвҖ”until he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palaceвҖҷs centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma

snippet.title: Street Fighter | Official Trailer (2026 Movie)
snippet.description:
FIGHT! Watch the Official Trailer for #StreetFighterMovie, hitting theaters everywhere October 16.вҖӮвҖӮ

Set in 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu (Andrew Koji) and Ken Masters (Noah Centineo) are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li (Callina Liang) recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they donвҖҷt, itвҖҷs GAME OVER!

Helmed by director Kitao Sakurai, Street Fighter is set to bring the battle from the arcade to the big screen with Hadoukens, roundhouses, and all your favorite characters.

Connect with #StreetFighterMovie online:
Website: https://www.streetfightermovie.com/ 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/streetfightermovie/
X: https://x.com/Street_fighter

Threads: https://www.threads.com/@streetfightermovie

Paramount Pictures Corporation (PPC), a global producer and distributor of filmed entertainment, is a unit of Paramount, a Skydance Corporation (NASDAQ: PSKY), a leading next-generation global media and entertainment company comprised of three business segments: Filmed Entertainment, Direct-to-Consumer, and TV Media. Paramount Pictures has some of the most powerful brands in filmed entertainment, including Paramount Pictures and Paramount Animation. PPC operations also include Paramount Home Entertainment, Paramount Pictures International, Paramount Licensing Inc., and Paramount Studio Group.

snippet.title: Avengers: Doomsday - First Trailer "The Last Thunder God" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
snippet.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr 

Watch the 'FAN (CONCEPT) Trailer Concept' For Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday (2026) (More Info About This Video Down Below!)


Avengers: Doomsday marks a major escalation in the Marvel universe as a new global and multiversal crisis forces EarthвҖҷs mightiest heroes into their most dangerous battle yet. With reality itself beginning to fracture, the emergence of Doctor Doom introduces a threat defined by intelligence, precision, and absolute ambition. The trailer sets a darker tone, showcasing large-scale destruction, collapsing worlds, and heroes struggling to maintain control in an increasingly unstable environment. As new and returning characters come together, the line between survival and defeat becomes thinner than ever.

The story explores a future where power alone may not be enough to stop what is coming, as DoomвҖҷs influence spreads through strategy, technology, and manipulation across multiple realities. The Avengers must face not only a powerful enemy, but also the consequences of a universe already pushed to its limits. Alliances are tested, leadership is challenged, and every decision carries weight beyond a single timeline. With massive action sequences, high emotional stakes, and strong crossover potential, Avengers: Doomsday stands as one of MarvelвҖҷs most ambitious projects, centered on collapse, resistance, and the fight to protect the future of the multiverse.

Editing, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail by @GalacticTrailerOfficial 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Software I use: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

в—Ғ On our channel, we create trailer mashups в–· Trailer mashups, also known as recut trailers, are crafted by gathering various film footage from one or more movies and re-editing them to form a brand-new trailer. These mashups often depict a movie that doesnвҖҷt exist or shift the genre of an existing film. As derivative works defined under the United States Copyright Act 17 U.S.C. В§ 101, they may be protected from copyright claims under the fair use doctrine.

Trailer mashups are not just a form of user-generated digital creativity but also a unique way to build excitement for upcoming releases, complementing official movie trailers. While traditional trailers tease the plot and generate hype, fan-made mashups let the audience put their own cinematic twist on existing footage. This creative freedom can spotlight a particular actor, emphasize a specific storyline, or even transform the filmвҖҷs genre entirely.

This video is a parody. Due to its derivative and transformative nature, it is protected under Fair Use.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Thank You So Much For Watching!
May the force be with us, Always!

аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨІаӨ° аӨ®аҘҲаӨ¶аӨ…аӨӘ аӨЁ аӨ•аҘҮаӨөаӨІ аӨүаӨӘаӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аӨ•аӨ°аҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ-аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҝаӨӨ аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨҝаӨҹаӨІ аӨ°аӨҡаӨЁаӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ®аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ°аҘӮаӨӘ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨ¬аӨІаҘҚаӨ•аӨҝ аӨҶаӨ—аӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨ°аӨҝаӨІаҘҖаӨңаӨј аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨүаӨӨаҘҚаӨёаӨҫаӨ№ аӨ¬аӨўаӨјаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ…аӨЁаҘӮаӨ аӨҫ аӨӨаӨ°аҘҖаӨ•аӨҫ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨңаҘӢ аӨҶаӨ§аӨҝаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аӨҝаӨ• аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨІаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аӨ• аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ аӨңаӨ№аӨҫаӨӮ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аӨӮаӨӘаӨ°аӨҝаӨ• аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨІаӨ° аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫаӨЁаӨ• аӨ•аӨҫ аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аҘҮаӨӨ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҡаӨҫаӨ° аӨүаӨӨаҘҚаӨӘаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨөаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ¶аӨӮаӨёаӨ•-аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҝаӨӨ аӨ®аҘҲаӨ¶аӨ…аӨӘ аӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аҘҢаӨңаҘӮаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ«аҘҒаӨҹаҘҮаӨң аӨӘаӨ° аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаӨҫ аӨёаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨ®аӨҫаӨҲ аӨ…аӨӮаӨҰаӨҫаӨңаӨј аӨңаҘӢаӨЎаӨјаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ…аӨЁаҘҒаӨ®аӨӨаӨҝ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ°аӨҡаӨЁаӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ®аӨ• аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨӨаӨӮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаҘҖ аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аҘҮаӨ· аӨ…аӨӯаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨүаӨңаӨҫаӨ—аӨ° аӨ•аӨ° аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаҘҖ аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҝаӨ·аҘҚаӨҹ аӨ•аӨ№аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨӘаӨ° аӨңаӨјаҘӢаӨ° аӨҰаҘҮ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¶аҘҲаӨІаҘҖ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӨаӨ°аӨ№ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҰаӨІ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨҜаӨ№ аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨҸаӨ• аӨӘаҘҲаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аҘҖ аӨөаҘҚаӨҜаҘҒаӨӨаҘҚаӨӘаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ°аҘӮаӨӘаӨҫаӨӮаӨӨаӨ°аӨЈаӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ®аӨ• аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аҘғаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аӨЈ, аӨҮаӨёаҘҮ аӨүаӨҡаӨҝаӨӨ аӨүаӨӘаӨҜаҘӢаӨ— аӨ•аҘҮ аӨӨаӨ№аӨӨ аӨёаӨӮаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҝаӨӨ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

fr-FR.title: Avengers : Doomsday - PremiГЁre bande-annonce В« Le dernier dieu du tonnerre В» | Chris Hemsworth | ...
fr-FR.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

DГ©couvrez le concept de bande-annonce (FAN) pour Avengers : Doomsday (2026) des studios Marvel (Plus d'infos ci-dessousВ !)

Avengers : Doomsday marque un tournant majeur dans l'univers Marvel. Une nouvelle crise mondiale et multiverselle contraint les plus grands hГ©ros de la Terre Г  livrer leur combat le plus pГ©rilleux. Alors que la rГ©alitГ© elle-mГӘme commence Г  se fissurer, l'Г©mergence du Docteur Fatalis introduit une menace caractГ©risГ©e par l'intelligence, la prГ©cision et une ambition absolue. La bande-annonce installe une ambiance plus sombre, dГ©voilant des destructions Г  grande Г©chelle, des mondes qui s'effondrent et des hГ©ros qui luttent pour garder le contrГҙle dans un environnement de plus en plus instable. Tandis que de nouveaux personnages et des hГ©ros de retour se rassemblent, la frontiГЁre entre la survie et la dГ©faite est plus tГ©nue que jamais.

L'histoire explore un futur oГ№ la force brute ne suffira peut-ГӘtre pas Г  arrГӘter le cataclysme, car l'influence de Fatalis s'Г©tend par la stratГ©gie, la technologie et la manipulation Г  travers de multiples rГ©alitГ©s. Les Avengers doivent affronter non seulement un ennemi redoutable, mais aussi les consГ©quences d'un univers dГ©jГ  poussГ© Г  ses limites. Les alliances sont mises Г  l'Г©preuve, le leadership contestГ©, et chaque dГ©cision a des rГ©percussions bien au-delГ  d'une simple ligne temporelle. Avec des scГЁnes d'action spectaculaires, une forte charge Г©motionnelle et un potentiel de crossover important, Avengers : Doomsday s'impose comme l'un des projets les plus ambitieux de Marvel, centrГ© sur l'effondrement, la rГ©sistance et la lutte pour protГ©ger l'avenir du multivers.

Montage, effets spГ©ciaux, effets sonores, miniature par @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Logiciels utilisГ©s : Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

в—Ғ Sur notre chaГ®ne, nous crГ©ons des mashups de bandes-annonces в–· Les mashups de bandes-annonces, aussi appelГ©s bandes-annonces remaniГ©es, sont rГ©alisГ©s en assemblant des extraits de films issus d'un ou plusieurs longs mГ©trages et en les remontant pour crГ©er une toute nouvelle bande-annonce. Ces mashups mettent souvent en scГЁne un film inexistant ou transforment le genre d'un film existant. En tant qu'Е“uvres dГ©rivГ©es, telles que dГ©finies par la loi amГ©ricaine sur le droit d'auteur (17 U.S.C. В§ 101), elles peuvent ГӘtre protГ©gГ©es contre les rГ©clamations pour atteinte aux droits d'auteur grГўce Г  la doctrine de l'utilisation Г©quitable (fair use).

Les mashups de bandes-annonces ne sont pas seulement une forme de crГ©ativitГ© numГ©rique gГ©nГ©rГ©e par les utilisateurs, mais aussi un moyen original de susciter l'enthousiasme autour des sorties Г  venir, en complГ©ment des bandes-annonces officielles. Tandis que les bandes-annonces traditionnelles dГ©voilent l'intrigue et crГ©ent le buzz, les mashups rГ©alisГ©s par les fans permettent au public d'apporter sa propre touche cinГ©matographique aux images existantes. Cette libertГ© crГ©ative peut mettre en avant un acteur en particulier, souligner une intrigue spГ©cifique, ou mГӘme transformer complГЁtement le genre du film.

Cette vidГ©o est une parodie. De par sa nature dГ©rivГ©e et transformative, elle est protГ©gГ©e par l'utilisation Г©quitable (fair use).

-------------------------------------------------------------------- Merci beaucoup d'avoir regardГ© !

Que la force soit avec nous !

snippet.title: Battleground S2 - Official Trailer | Shikhar Dhawan, Khesari Lal, Fukra Insaan, Priyanka, Rahul
snippet.description:
Amazon MX Player presents
Battleground Season 2 - Official Trailer

Starring: Shikhar Dhawan, Fukra Insaan (Abhishek Malhan), Khesarilal Yadav, Priyanka Chahar Choudhary, Rahul Chaudhari
Production House: Rusk Studios
Produced By: Rusk Media
Directed By: Monisha Jaisingh Vaid
Genre: Reality Show, Unscripted

@ThumsUpOfficial presents Battleground Season 2
Activewear Partner: @performaxactivewear 
Comfort Partner: @damensch7036 
Special Partner: @eekenlife3425 
Sunscreen Partner: @fixderma.skincare 
Associate Partner: Sheth Brothers

@shikhardhawan5942 @KhesariMusicWorld  @priyaankachaharchoudhary @FukraInsaan 

About Show: Battleground is here to find IndiaвҖҷs next fitness superstar, with cricket icon Shikhar Dhawan as the Super Selector. Over 5 weeks, 4 teams, and 1 house, 16 contestants will face off in intense physical challenges, earning вҖҳCreditsвҖҷ for themselves and their teams. Only 1 male and 1 female contestant will be crowned as the ultimate fitness champions. Leading the teams are dynamic personalities: Abhishek Malhan, Khesarilal Yadav, Priyanka Chahar Choudhary and Rahul Chaudhari bringing energy and strategy to the game. The contestants will live and train in a Bootcamp-style house, where their mental resilience, endurance, and teamwork will be tested every day. With daily episodes showcasing highlights, challenges, and behind-the-scenes moments, viewers will witness the drama, determination, and grit of each participant. As they push themselves to their limits, only the strongest will make it to the top. Who will become IndiaвҖҷs next fitness superstar? Tune in to find out!

hi.title: Nawaj Ansari - IRSHYA (Official Music Video)
hi.description:
аӨЁаӨөаӨҫаӨң аӨ…аӨӮаӨёаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҲаӨӘаҘҖ 'аӨ—аӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ' аӨёаҘҮ 'аӨҮаӨ°аӨ¶аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ' аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҒаӨӨ аӨ•аӨ° аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ
аӨЎаҘҖаӨ“аӨӘаҘҖ/аӨҸаӨЎаӨҝаӨҹ/аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨЁ: аӨ°аҘҮаӨө аӨңаҘӮаӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨ°аҘӨ

аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨӨаӨ• аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨёаӨ¬аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ°аӨҡаӨЁаӨҫаӨ“аӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨҮаӨёаҘҮ аӨҰаҘҒаӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨҰаҘӢаӨ¬аӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨқаӨҫ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨӨаӨҫ аӨҘаӨҫаҘӨ

аӨ°аҘҮаӨө аӨңаҘӮаӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨ° аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ«аҘүаӨІаҘӢ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ: https://www.instagram.com/visualsbyrave

аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ№аҘҖ, аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨөаҘҖаӨЁаӨӨаӨ® аӨҸаӨІаҘҚаӨ¬аӨ® 'аӨ®аӨҝаӨІаӨҝаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҮаӨӮаӨЎаӨёаҘҮаӨҹ' аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨЁаӨҫ аӨЁ аӨӯаҘӮаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ:

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Banjaare - Bairan
Bairan - Banjaare

вң– Stream / Download:
https://open.spotify.com/album/3ZIsrV7xUXWX4tR0vk1CGF

вң– Follow Banjaare:
https://instagram.com/official_banjaare

рҹҺӨ  Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaarРө ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue mРөin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

snippet.title: Rama | Namit MalhotraвҖҷs Ramayana | Nitesh Tiwari | Ranbir, Yash, Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
snippet.description:
Rama is the greatest of all time because he lived a life where the choices he made were always in the benefit of the greater good, duty over desire, and sacrifice over self. 

His legacy continues to enhance and empower humanity over time and bring the belief in the goodness of the human spirit to resolve all conflict and bring peace to the world. 

Namit MalhotraвҖҷs Ramayana 
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari 

In cinemas worldwide
Ramayana Part 1 рҹҸ№
Diwali 2026

---------------------------------------------------

Namit MalhotraвҖҷs Ramayana
Our Truth. Our History.

Starring: 
Ranbir Kapoor as Rama 
Yash as Ravana 
Sai Pallavi as Sita 
Ravie Dubey as Lakshman 
Sunny Deol as Hanuman

Co-Produced by Yash
Adapted for Screenplay by Shridhar Raghavan & Nitesh Tiwari.
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari

Music by Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
Lyrics by Kumar Vishwas

VFX by DNEG (8-time Academy Award winner)

Filmed for IMAX

Presented by Prime Focus Studios in association with Monster Mind Creations

Audio on Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd (C) 2026

snippet.title: French Montana - Unforgettable (Lyrics) ft. Swae Lee
snippet.description:
French Montana - Unforgettable (Lyrics) ft. Swae Lee: Song from Coachella 2026

Check Out the Coachella 2026 Rap/Hip-Hop, R&B Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg2x_V0qn2yoXAThIirv3AHI_R5Ngazct

вӯҗFollow Afterglow:
Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/davcev/?hl=en
Spotify: https://www.instagram.com/davcev/?hl=en
рҹ”ҙ Picture : https://lexica.art/ 

вӯҗFrench Montana:
https://www.instagram.com/frenchmontana/

Lyrics:

[Pre-Chorus: Swae Lee]
It's not good enough for me
Since I've been with you, ooh
It's not gonna work for you
Nobody can equal me (I know)
I'm gonna sip on this drink, when I'm fucked up
I should know how to pick up
I'm gonna catch the rhythm
While she push up against me, ooh, and she tipsy
I had enough convo for 24
I peeped you from across the room
Pretty little body dancin' like GoGo, hey

[Chorus: Swae Lee]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone (Ooh)
Why not? A fucking good time never hurt nobody
I got a little drink, but it's not Bacardi
If you loved the girl, then I'm so, so sorry
I gotta give it to her like we in a marriage
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do

[Verse 1: French Montana]
Feelin' like I'm fresh out, Boosie (Boosie)
If they want the drama, got the Uzi (Uzi)
Ship the whole crew to the cruise ship (Cruise)
Doin' shit you don't even see in movies (Movies)
Ride with me, ride with me, boss (Boss)
I got a hard head, but her ass soft (Soft)
She want the last name with the ring on it
'Cause I pulled out a million cash, told her plank on it (Skrrt)

[Refrain: Swae Lee & French Montana]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone
Now you wanna choose
Just pop the bubbly in the 'cuzi (Ow)

[Pre-Chorus: Swae Lee]
It's not good enough for me
Since I've been with you, ooh
I'm gonna sip on this drink, when I'm fucked up
I should know how to pick up
I'm gonna catch the rhythm
While she push up against me, ooh, and she tipsy
I had enough convo for 24
I peeped you from across the room
Pretty little body dancin' like GoGo, hey

[Chorus: Swae Lee]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone (Ooh)
Why not? A fucking good time never hurt nobody
I got a little drink, but it's not Bacardi
If you loved the girl, then I'm so, so sorry
I gotta give it to her like we in a marriage
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do (Oh)
[Verse 2: French Montana]
You ain't enough for me
Too much for you, alone
Baby, go and grab some bad bitches, bring 'em home
Know the jet's on me
I'ma curve my best for you, you know
So pick up that dress for me
Leave the rest on
Too much convo for 24 hours
When you stand next to me, 24 karats
She left her man at home
She don't love him no more
I want your mind and your body
Don't mind nobody
So, you don't ever hurt nobody
Baby girl, work your body, work your body

[Refrain: Swae Lee & French Montana]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone
Now you wanna choose (Ooh)
Just pop the bubbly in the 'cuzi
Why not?

[Outro: Swae Lee]
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do

Contact: afterglow.musicrecord@gmail.com

Released 07/04/2017
From the album "Now ThatвҖҷs What I Call Music 2018"

#pawansingh #khushikakkar #khushitiwari #sadiyaaejaan #pawansinghnewsong #pawansinghnewvideo #bhojpurivideo #bhojpurisong2026 #newbhojpurivideo2026 #newbhojpurisong2026 

Lyrics
F - аӨёаҘҒаӨҳаӨ° аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҖаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨңаӨҫаӨөаӨҹ аӨ¬аӨІаӨ® аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аҘҖ аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҖаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨөаӨҹ аӨ¬аӨІаӨ®
аӨ°аӨүаӨҶ аӨІаӨҫ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҹаҘҮ аӨёаҘӢаӨ°аӨ№ аӨҶаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ°аӨӨаӨҝ аӨӯаӨ° аӨЁаӨҮаӨ–аҘҮ аӨ®аӨҝаӨІаӨҫаӨөаӨҹ аӨ¬аӨІаӨ®  
M аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨІаӨҫ аӨӘ аӨ—аӨңаӨ¬аҘҮ аӨ®аҘӣаӨҫ аӨ®аӨҝаӨІаҘҮаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁ 
аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҮ..
аӨ•аӨ®аӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨ•аӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаӨЎаӨјаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ–аӨҝаӨІаҘҮаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁ.....

M - аӨ•аӨҫаӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨҮаӨёаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҒ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аҘҮаӨІаҘӮ аӨ§аӨЁ аӨ•аӨЁаӨ–аҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ 
аӨ—аҘӢаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨІаҘҖ аӨӘ аӨІаҘҮаӨөаҘҮаӨҰ аӨҡаҘҒаӨ®аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ аӨёаӨЁаӨ® аӨӨаӨЁаӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ 
F - аӨҰаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ—аҘҒаӨЎ аӨЁаӨҫаӨҮаӨҹ аӨ• аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¬ 
аӨ®аӨ№аӨӮаӨ— аӨҮаӨЁаӨӯаӨҫаӨҲаӨҹ аӨ• аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¬ 
M - аӨҡаӨІаӨІаӨҫ аӨӘ аӨҰаӨ№аӨҝаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨөаҘҮ аӨ№аӨҝаӨІаҘҮаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁ
аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҮ..
аӨ•аӨ®аӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨ•аӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаӨЎаӨјаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ–аӨҝаӨІаҘҮаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁ.....

M - аӨ№аӨөаҘҮ аӨёаҘӮаӨӨаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ аӨҸ аӨ§аӨЁаҘҖ аӨңаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨҫ аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨҰ аӨёаӨҹаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ 
аӨ•аӨҫаӨІаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨЎаӨјаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ•аӨ№аӨ¬аҘӮ аӨӨ 
аӨ• аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҒаӨ•аӨҫаӨЁ аӨ№аӨ® аӨӘаӨҹаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ 
F - аӨӘаӨ№аӨҝаӨ° аӨІаҘҮаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ•аӨҫаӨҹаӨЁ аӨ¬аӨІаӨ® аӨңаҘҖ 
аӨ•аӨ°аҘҖ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨүаӨҰаҘҚаӨҳаӨҫаӨҹаӨЁ аӨ¬аӨІаӨ® аӨңаҘҖ 
M аӨҶаӨ¶аҘҒ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨӮаӨ¶аҘҒ аӨ•аҘҒаӨ°аҘҚаӨӨаҘҖ аӨёаӨҝаӨІаҘҮаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁ 
аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҮ..
аӨ•аӨ®аӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨ•аӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаӨЎаӨјаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ–аӨҝаӨІаҘҮаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁ.....

аӨ•аӨ°аӨ… аӨӨаӨҫаӨ°аҘҒ аӨҡаҘӢаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҡаҘӢаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ•аӨҮаӨёаҘҮ аӨӯаӨҮаӨІ аӨңаҘӢаӨ°аӨҫ аӨңаҘӢаӨ°аҘҖ
аӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ№аҘҒаӨҶ .......    аӨҶ

аӨӘаӨ№аӨҝаӨІаӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫаӨөаӨ…
аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҹаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҝаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨӨаҘҒ аӨ•аҘҒаӨӣ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨӣаҘҒаӨӘаӨҫаӨөаӨ… -аҘЁ

female -
аӨ№аҘӢаӨ аӨөаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ№аҘӢаӨ аӨөаӨҫ аӨёаҘҮ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ№аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ№аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаҘҮ 
аӨ°аҘҒаӨҲ аӨңаҘҲаӨёаӨҫ аӨЁаӨ°аӨ® аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ

аӨңаӨІаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨңаҘӢаӨ¬аӨЁ аӨӘаҘҮ аӨҡаҘӮаӨІаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫ аӨ°аҘӢаӨҹаҘҖ аӨ—аӨ°аӨ® аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ

snippet.title: Arijit Singh - Zaalima | Shah Rukh Khan | Raees | Harshdeep Kaur | Love Song
snippet.description:
Song - Zaalima
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol DeвҖҰ
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol DeвҖҰ

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

аӨ®аҘҖаӨЁ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ®аӨҝаӨҘаҘҒаӨЁ
аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аӨҝаӨЁ аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨІаӨ—аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨ№аӨ® аӨҰаҘӢаӨЁаҘӢаӨӮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ¬аӨ№аҘҒаӨӨ аӨ…аӨҡаҘҚаӨӣаҘҮ аӨІаӨ—аҘҮаӨӮаӨ—аҘҮ
аӨ…аӨ—аӨ° аӨӨаҘҒаӨ® аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨ°аӨҫаӨӨ аӨӯаӨ° аӨ°аҘҒаӨ•аӨЁаҘҮ аӨҰаҘӢ
аӨӨаҘӢ аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨІаӨ—аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨ№аӨ®аҘҮаӨ¶аӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨҜаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ°аӨ№аӨЁаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЎаӨјаҘҮаӨ—аӨҫ

аӨ“аӨ№
аӨҸаӨ• аӨ°аӨҫаӨӨ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨҠаӨ¬ аӨ—аӨҲ аӨҘаҘҖ
аӨ”аӨ° аӨҮаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аӨЁаҘҮаӨҹ аӨӘаӨ° аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ аӨӘаҘҖаӨӣаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаӨ№аӨң аӨ¬аҘҒаӨҰаҘҚаӨ§аӨҝ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ…аӨӮаӨӨаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаҘҚаӨһаӨҫаӨЁ
аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮаӨ•аӨҝ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ№аӨ®аҘҮаӨ¶аӨҫ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ№аӨ® аӨҰаҘӢаӨЁаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҮаӨё аӨӨаӨ°аӨ№ аӨ–аӨЎаӨјаҘҮ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨёаӨӘаӨЁаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҫ аӨҘаӨҫ
аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҘаӨ°аҘӮаӨ® аӨ•аҘҖ аӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨЁ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҸаӨ•-аӨҰаҘӮаӨёаӨ°аҘҮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨёаӨҹаӨ•аӨ° аӨ–аӨЎаӨјаҘҮ
аӨӨаҘҒаӨ® аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨёаӨҫаӨҜ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҰаҘҖаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨӘаӨ° аӨ¬аӨЁаҘҖ аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаҘҖ аӨӘаӨ°аҘҖ аӨңаҘҲаӨёаҘҖ аӨІаӨ— аӨ°аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ№аҘӢ
аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨҶаӨң аӨӨаӨ• аӨҮаӨӨаӨЁаҘҖ аӨңаҘҖаӨөаӨӮаӨӨ аӨ•аӨӯаҘҖ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ°аӨ№аҘҖ
аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аӨҝаӨЁ аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨҡаҘӮаӨ® аӨІаҘӢ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ¶аӨҫаӨҜаӨҰ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ
аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨҡаҘӮаӨ® аӨІаҘӢ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ¶аӨҫаӨҜаӨҰ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ
аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨҡаҘӮаӨ® аӨІаҘӢ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ¶аӨҫаӨҜаӨҰ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ®аӨ° аӨңаӨҫаӨҠаӨҒ

#OliviaRodrigo #dropdead #youseemprettysadforagirlsoinlove

аӨ“аӨІаӨҝаӨөаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨ—аҘӢ аӨҰаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҒаӨӨ аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ 'аӨЎаҘҚаӨ°аҘүаӨӘ аӨЎаҘҮаӨЎ' аӨ•аӨҫ аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаҘӨ В© 2026 аӨ“аӨІаӨҝаӨөаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨ—аҘӢ, аӨ—аҘҮаӨ«аҘҮаӨЁ аӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аҘүаӨ°аҘҚаӨЎаҘҚаӨё аӨ•аҘҮ аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аҘҮаӨ· аӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨёаҘҮаӨӮаӨё аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨӮаӨӨаӨ°аҘҚаӨ—аӨӨаҘӨ

snippet.title: They Played PUBG Mobile BLINDFOLDED & This Happened рҹҳӮ |
snippet.description:
рҹ”Ҙ What happens when pro players try to play blindfolded ? Chaos, laughter, and insane teamwork!

In this hilarious challenge featuring PUBG Mobile, we put two teams head-to-head:
рҹ‘ү *Nofear & Sky* рҹҶҡ *Sleepyy & Jiggle*

But hereвҖҷs the twist one player on each team is completely BLINDFOLDED рҹҳөвҖҚрҹ’« while their teammate guides them using only voice commands! Will communication be enough to secure the win, or will it turn into total disaster? рҹҳӮ

рҹ’Ҙ Expect :
* Funny moments & fails
* Pure teamwork (or complete confusion рҹҳҶ)

Big thanks to our sponsors: Red Bull, Infinix, and WorldLink for making this possible!

Lyrics :-

аӨ¬аӨҝаӨҜаӨ°аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨҝаӨёаӨҝ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аӨ®аӨІ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨёаӨҝ 
аӨ¬аӨҝаӨҜаӨ°аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨҝаӨёаӨҝ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аӨ®аӨІ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨёаӨҝ 

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ, аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ 
аӨ…аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨ¬аҘҲ аӨ«аҘҒаӨҡаҘҚаӨҡаҘҮаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨҫаӨҲаӨЎ аӨІаӨҫаӨ— 

аӨҳаӨ° аӨӨ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘӢ аӨҜаӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨ№аҘҲаӨЁ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҒаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ 
аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ аӨ°аҘҒаӨӘаӨІаҘҮ аӨҸ аӨ•аӨҫаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣаӨҝ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІаҘҲ аӨҡаҘӢаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ, аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ 
аӨ…аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨ¬аҘҲ аӨ«аҘҒаӨҡаҘҚаӨҡаҘҮаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨҫаӨҲаӨЎ аӨІаӨҫаӨ— 

аӨ®аӨҫаӨҲаӨІаӨҫ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ№аӨңаҘҒаӨ°, аӨ•аҘҮаӨӣ аӨ•аҘҮаӨҹаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ№аӨІаҘҚаӨІаӨҝаӨҡаӨІаҘҚаӨІаҘҖ
аӨ аӨҝаӨ• аӨӣ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҲ, аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ 
аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ№аӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ ?

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘӮ аӨ–аҘҲ 
аӨӘаӨҫаӨҒаӨҡ аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨ· аӨІаӨӯ аӨӘаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨІаӨ«аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨЎ аӨӘаҘӢаӨҮаӨІ аӨ—аҘҲ 
аӨ№аӨҫаӨ№аӨҫаӨ№аӨҫ ... аӨ№аӨҫаӨ№аӨҫаӨ№аӨҫ..
аӨ®аӨҫаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣаҘҮ аӨ¬аҘҢаӨІаӨҫаӨҸаӨёаҘҖ аӨ•аӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨӣ аӨ° аӨ–аҘҲ 

аӨӯаҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁ аӨҶаӨүаӨӣаҘҒ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨҘаҘҖ аӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ•аҘӢаӨ№аӨІаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҡаҘӢаӨ•аӨ®аӨҫ 
аӨҸаӨ• аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаҘҒаӨЁ аӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨёаҘҖ аӨ–аӨҫаӨҸаӨҒ аӨ®аҘҲаӨІаҘҮ аӨ°аӨҝаӨёаӨ•аҘӢ аӨқаҘӢаӨ•аӨ®аӨҫ 

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ, аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ 
аӨ…аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨ¬аҘҲ аӨ«аҘҒаӨҡаҘҚаӨҡаҘҮаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨҫаӨҲаӨЎ аӨІаӨҫаӨ— 

аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ - аӨҜаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҜаӨӨаӨҫ 
аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ - аӨҜаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҜаӨӨаӨҫ 

аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘҲ аӨёаҘҢаӨ°аӨҫаӨҲ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨӘаӨӣаҘҖ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨӯаҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаҘӢ аӨқаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ® аӨқаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ® 
аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘҲ аӨёаҘҢаӨ°аӨҫаӨҲ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨӘаӨӣаҘҖ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨӯаҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаҘӢ аӨқаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ® аӨқаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ®

аӨ…аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨ¬аҘҲ аӨ«аҘҒаӨҡаҘҚаӨҡаҘҮаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨҫаӨҲаӨЎ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ, аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ, аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ

snippet.title: Jab Talak (First Look) Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika | Pritam, Arijit Singh, Amitabh, Akasa | Cocktail 2
snippet.description:
WARNING вҡ пёҸ
This summer just got HOTTERрҹ”Ҙ

#JabTalak first look out now

#DanceLikeNoOnesWatching #Cocktail2Song #MaddockFilms 

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

рҹҺ§ Song Credits 

вһҹ Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna
вһҹ Music : Universal Music India and Mad For Mussic 
вһҹ Singer : Arijit Singh, Akasa
вһҹ Composer: Pritam Chakraborty
вһҹ Lyrics : Amitabh Bhattacharya 

Dinesh Vijan & Luv Ranjan presents #Cocktail2вҖӢ, releasing in cinemas on 19th June, 2026

A Maddock Films & Luv Films Production

рҹҺ¬ Video Credits

вһҹ Cast: Shahid Kapoor,  Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna 
вһҹ Directed By: Homi Adajania 
вһҹ Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan & Ankur Garg
вһҹ Written By: Tarun Jain & Luv Ranjan
вһҹ Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja

вһҹ Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
вһҹ Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
вһҹ Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
вһҹ Director of Choreography: Vijay A. Ganguly
вһҹ Publicity Design: Himanshu  & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Lyrics:


(Main Naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) Г—4

Hai thoda besura par dil mein taal hai
Isko hum naachne se
tokein kab talak

(Main Naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) Г—4

Nachchaan aaj main shukar mana ke
Sone yaar tonh nazrein mila ke
Mainu lor kise di koi na
saare jag di laaj bhula ke

Chal mood banake sufi
Thodi kar lein bewakoofi
Choolhe mein jaaye mitra
Duniya bhar ki masroofi

Pairon ko par lagne se rokeon kab talak

(Main Naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) Г—4


ANTARA

Ve raanjha aag hai jitni idhar lagi
Tu bhi maan le dugni udhar lagi

Dono dil hi barabar jhulas gaye 
Pher.. jaan de kitni kidhar lagi

Ajj yaar de karke sadqe 
Maine pyale pyale gatke
Chal dekhein dil patri se
Aakhir kab tak na bhatke

Denge bhi ik dooje ko dhokhe kab talak..

(Main naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) Г—4

Behki jawaniyaan jaise barood hain
Dekhein uthte nahin hain 
Shole kab talak

(Main naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) Г—2

To Pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga 
Re Hottha Na Gulab Likh Diyu 
Re Akhya Ne Sharab Likhunga

To pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga
Chunni Mai Jo Moti Jadre Usne Chhori Tara Likhu 
Chand Fika Lagge Se Yo Rup Kitna Pyara Lilkhu 
Ram Ka ishara Likhu Dekhya Na Nazara Likhhu Bat Chhoti Lage Meri Kaat Ke dubara Likkhu 
Re Battan Ne Alap Likhunga 
Jo dikhja Tu Khaab Likhunga 
Je likhne Mai Beth Gya tane 
To Pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga

Ho Pariya Ke desh Te Tu Aayi Vissa Dalke 
Red Moon Jisi E Tu lage Se Kamal 
CanвҖҷt lu Without You You Baby Mine 
If You Touch Me So am Feeling Fine 
Likhu Tere Bare Saari Duniya Ke Bol Laau 
Likhu Tere Bare Sari Duniya Ne Bhul Jau 
Likkhu Tere Bare fir Kuch Or Na Mai Likh Pau 
Tod ke Kalam Fir Fanshi Pe Mai Jhul Jaau 

Tanne Mai Meri Radha Likh Diyu

Tanne Mai likhhu Rani Dil ki

аӨҜаӨ№ аӨӯаӨңаӨЁ аӨӯаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҸаӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ, аӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаҘҚаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаӨ®аӨ°аҘҚаӨӘаӨЈ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҮаӨёаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӯаӨ—аӨөаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨөаӨҝаӨӯаӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ°аҘӮаӨӘаҘӢаӨӮ аӨңаҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҒаӨ°аҘҚаӨ—аӨҫ, аӨӯаӨ—аӨөаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ¶аӨҝаӨө, аӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ®, аӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ•аҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈ, аӨ—аӨЈаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨңаҘҖ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ…аӨЁаҘҚаӨҜ аӨҰаҘҮаӨөаӨӨаӨҫаӨ“аӨӮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ®аӨ№аӨҝаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ—аҘҒаӨЈаӨ—аӨҫаӨЁ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨӯаӨңаӨЁ аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаӨЁаҘҮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¶аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨаӨҝ, аӨёаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ®аӨ• аӨҠаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҶаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ®аӨҝаӨ• аӨ¶аӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨӘаҘҚаӨӨ аӨ№аҘӢаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
вҖңаӨҰаӨҝаӨөаҘҚаӨҜ аӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨӯаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝвҖқ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҮаӨё аӨӯаӨңаӨЁ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨүаӨҰаҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аҘҚаӨҜ аӨ•аҘҮаӨөаӨІ аӨ®аӨЁаҘӢаӨ°аӨӮаӨңаӨЁ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ, аӨ¬аӨІаҘҚаӨ•аӨҝ аӨӯаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҲаӨ¶аҘҚаӨөаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝ аӨ—аӨ№аӨ°аҘҖ аӨҶаӨёаҘҚаӨҘаӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ® аӨёаҘҮ аӨңаҘӢаӨЎаӨјаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨңаӨ¬ аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨӯаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨ аӨҮаӨё аӨӯаӨңаӨЁ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаҘҚаӨ§аӨҫ аӨёаҘҮ аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨӨаҘӢ аӨөаӨ№ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҮ аӨңаҘҖаӨөаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ•аӨ·аҘҚаӨҹаҘӢаӨӮ, аӨҰаҘҒаӨ–аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ¬аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫаӨ“аӨӮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҒаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨӘаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨ— аӨ–аҘӢаӨң аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨҜаӨ№ аӨӯаӨңаӨЁ аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аҘҮаӨ· аӨ°аҘӮаӨӘ аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘӮаӨңаӨҫ, аӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨЁ, аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаҘҖ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ§аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҝаӨ• аӨ…аӨөаӨёаӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨүаӨӘаӨҜаҘҒаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аҘҖ аӨ®аӨ§аҘҒаӨ° аӨ§аҘҒаӨЁ аӨ”аӨ° аӨӘаӨөаӨҝаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨ¶аӨ¬аҘҚаӨҰ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӯаӨҫаӨө-аӨөаӨҝаӨӯаҘӢаӨ° аӨ•аӨ° аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҶаӨӨаҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӘаӨ°аӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ аӨёаҘҮ аӨңаҘӢаӨЎаӨјаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ

аӨҜаӨҰаӨҝ аӨҶаӨӘ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҮ аӨңаҘҖаӨөаӨЁ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ¶аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨаӨҝ, аӨёаҘҒаӨ– аӨ”аӨ° аӨҰаӨҝаӨөаҘҚаӨҜ аӨ•аҘғаӨӘаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨӨаҘӢ аӨҮаӨё аӨӯаӨңаӨЁ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ…аӨөаӨ¶аҘҚаӨҜ аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨңаӨЁаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨёаӨҫаӨқаӨҫ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ

snippet.title: Vyah Karwado Ji | Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai | Varun D | Mrunal T | WNC | Mika S | Asees K | Vayu
snippet.description:
Get ready to celebrate love, music, and full-on wedding vibes with Vyah Karwado Ji from Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai рҹҺүрҹ’ғ

Featuring the dynamic duo Varun Dhawan and Mrunal Thakur, this high-energy track is packed with vibrant visuals, desi swag, and electrifying dance moments that will make you hit the dance floor instantly! рҹ•әрҹ”Ҙ

#HaiJawaniTohIshqHonaHai in cinemas on 22nd May 2026.

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Singers: Mika Singh, Asees Kaur
Lyrics: Vayu

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. ItвҖҷs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вҖ” interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вҖ” be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вҖңCapture the FlagвҖқ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (вҖңRobuxвҖқ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨ№ - аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨҰаҘҮаӨөаҘҖ - аӨҰаҘҮаӨөаӨӨаӨҫаӨ“ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ…аӨЁаӨ®аҘӢаӨІ аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨ№ || аӨңаӨҜ аӨ—аӨЈаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨҰаҘҮаӨөаӨҫ | аҘҗ аӨңаӨҜ аӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶ аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮ аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨҒ
snippet.description:
аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨ№ - аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨҰаҘҮаӨөаҘҖ - аӨҰаҘҮаӨөаӨӨаӨҫаӨ“ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ…аӨЁаӨ®аҘӢаӨІ аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨ№ || аӨңаӨҜ аӨ—аӨЈаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨҰаҘҮаӨөаӨҫ | аҘҗ аӨңаӨҜ аӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶ аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮ аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨҒ
аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨ№ - аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨҰаҘҮаӨөаҘҖ - аӨҰаҘҮаӨөаӨӨаӨҫаӨ“ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ…аӨЁаӨ®аҘӢаӨІ аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨ№ || аӨңаӨҜ аӨ—аӨЈаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨҰаҘҮаӨөаӨҫ | аҘҗ аӨңаӨҜ аӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶ аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮ аӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨҒ

#аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮ #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӘаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨ®аӨ№аҘҮаӨӮаӨҰаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аӨӘаҘӮаӨ° #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖаӨІаӨҝаӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аҘҚаӨё #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨ№аӨҫаӨ°аӨ®аҘӢаӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨ® #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨ§аҘҒаӨЁ #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮ #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖomjaijagdishhareaartisheebaashishchandranewaarti2022vishnuji #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аӨ¬аӨ”аӨ°аӨӘаӨ¶аҘҚаӨҡаӨҝаӨ® #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨІаӨҝаӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аҘҚаӨё #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨ°аӨҝаӨӮаӨ—аӨҹаҘӢаӨЁ #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҮаӨҹаӨё #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮlyrics #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮаӨҶаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖаӨЁаҘҮаӨӘаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮand #аҘҗаӨңаӨҜаӨңаӨ—аӨҰаҘҖаӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аҘҮhanded

Lyrics for "Lauv - I Like Me Better"

[Verse 1]
To be young and in love in New York City
To not know who I am but still know that I'm good long as you're here with me
To be drunk and in love in New York City
Midnight into morning coffee, burning through the hours talking
Damn

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time, 'cause
I like me better when, I like me better when I'm with you

[Verse 2]
I don't know what it is but I got that feeling
Waking up in this bed next to you swear the room, yeah, it got no ceiling
If we lay, let the day just pass us by
I might get to too much talking, I might have to tell you something
Damn

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time, 'cause
I like me better when, I like me better when I'm with you

[Bridge]
Stay awhile, stay awhile
Stay here with me
Stay awhile, stay awhile, oh
Stay awhile, stay awhile
Stay here with me
Lay here with me, ooh

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you (yes I do, yes I do, babe)
I like me better when I'm with you (oooh noo)
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time, 'cause
I like me better when, I like me better when I'm with you

[Outro]
(I like me, I like me)
(Look who you made me, made me, oh noo)
Better when
I like me better when I'm with you

Г—=Г—=Г—=Г—=Г—

snippet.title: Searching for a Civilization that Doesn't Exist
snippet.description:
As King of the Unstable SMP, I recently sent 1000 players on an expedition outside of my kingdom. When I returned, all of them were missing. This is searching for a civilization that doesn't exist. 

Unstable SMP:
вһң вҖӘ  вҖӘ  @FlameFragsMC 
вһң     @wemmbumc 
вһң     @Spokeishere 
вһң     @ParrotX2  

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.

People in this video: @TheobaldTheBird 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where ParrotX2, Wemmbu, Spoke, and FlameFrags tell stories in Minecraft.

A Minecraft video made by Parrot or ParrotX2 on other platforms! Enjoy!
tags: Here's Why I Made 12240 Minecraft Cakes

localized.title: Searching for a Civilization that Doesn't Exist
localized.description:
As King of the Unstable SMP, I recently sent 1000 players on an expedition outside of my kingdom. When I returned, all of them were missing. This is searching for a civilization that doesn't exist. 

Unstable SMP:
вһң вҖӘ  вҖӘ  @FlameFragsMC 
вһң     @wemmbumc 
вһң     @Spokeishere 
вһң     @ParrotX2  

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.

People in this video: @TheobaldTheBird 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where ParrotX2, Wemmbu, Spoke, and FlameFrags tell stories in Minecraft.

A Minecraft video made by Parrot or ParrotX2 on other platforms! Enjoy!

вҳ„пёҸ Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Summer after high school, when we first met
We'd make out in your Mustang to Radiohead
And on my eighteenth birthday, we got matching tattoos
Used to steal your parents' liquor and climb to the roof
Talked about our future like we had a clue
Never planned that one day, I'd be losing you

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Verse 2]
I was June, and you were my Johnny Cash
Never one without the other, we made a pact
Sometimes when I miss you, I put those records on, woah
Someone said you had your tattoo removed
Saw you downtown, singing the blues
It's time to face the music, I'm no longer your muse

[Chorus]
But in another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Post-Chorus]
The one
The one
The one
The one that got away

[Bridge]
All this money can't buy me a time machine, no
Can't replace you with a million rings, no
I should've told you what you meant to me, woah
'Cause now I pay the price

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away (The one that got away)

[Post-Chorus]
The one (The one)
The one (The one)
The one (The one)
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away
